underlying_goal: Set up and configure the AI girlfriend project's frontend and backend, with proper environment variable configuration and OpenRouter as the preferred LLM provider, and allow model configuration from the frontend settings page
friction_detail: Backend required .env API key to start, preventing frontend settings page from being usable for initial configuration — a chicken-and-egg problem the user wanted solved differently.
brief_summary: User wanted to start the project's frontend/backend, update env configuration for OpenRouter, and enable frontend-based model settings; env config was updated and committed but the frontend config flow fix was still in progress.
